title: helenium cuneifolium
intro: Helenium cuneifolium, also known as the narrow-leaved sneezeweed, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and narrow, lance-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Helenium cuneifolium include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as congestion and coughs, due to its expectorant properties, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Helenium cuneifolium can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to treat colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
